creator: hrkfdn@gmail.com
text:
Thanks a lot for the PR! I have revised the mpdas Makefile so that it
now accepts custom PREFIX values. mpdas is now at version 0.2.5 which
features other bugfixes. It also now has an rc.d script for FreeBSD.
Submitter, please commit this patch:
http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/139477

Again, thanks for the report!
